description: Microalliance Group Inc. develops and sells coffee and liquor products primarily in the People's Republic of China. It offers coffee products, including Chinese black tea, premium black coffee, and other coffee products. The company sells its coffee products wholesale to retail partners and corporate customers, as well as directly to consumers through its e-commerce channels. In addition, it provides pre-opening assistance services to retail partners to operate coffee stores. Further, the company offers liquor products through sales agents, distributors, and franchisees.
